title: Synthos Backup Manifest v1.0
description: Schema for manifest.json embedded at the root of every Synthos v2 encrypted backup tarball. See BACKUP_MANIFEST_CONTRACT.md and BACKUP_SYSTEM.md for full context.

manifest_version.description: Schema version. Currently 1.0. Installer rejects unknown major versions.

synthos_version.description: Synthos version that produced the backup (e.g. '3.0').

node_type.description: Logical role of the source node. Installer rejects mismatch with target node.

stream.description: v2 extension: which stream this archive represents. Used for R2 path layout (<stream>/<pi_id>/<date>/...).

pi_id.description: Unique identifier of the source node. May be a legacy name (e.g. 'synthos-pi-retail') even when node_type is the v2 vocabulary.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of backup creation, e.g. '2026-05-03T05:30:00Z'.

date.description: Optional convenience field — UTC date portion of created_at (YYYY-MM-DD).

checksum_sha256.description: SHA-256 over the decrypted tar's content members (excluding manifest.json), iterated in arcname-sorted order.

size_bytes_decrypted.description: Total size in bytes of the content files (sum of sizes), used by installer for disk pre-check.

key_id.description: Logical key identifier. Currently always 'primary'. Allows future key rotation.

src.description: Path inside the tar (POSIX, relative to tar root). For directories MUST end with /.

dest.description: Path inside the node's SYNTHOS_HOME to restore to.

permissions.description: Octal mode string (e.g. '0600'). Defaults: 0644 for files, 0755 for directories.

required.description: If true, restore aborts when this entry is absent.

merge_strategy.description: replace = overwrite/delete-then-copy; merge = overlay onto dest preserving dest-only files.
